title: JobReport
description: Global Job Intelligence Report — a deep, user-independent analysis of a job posting. Describes what the role actually does, what organizational problem it solves, and what underlying capabilities it requires. Layer 2 structured form; Layer 1 is the companion narrative report.md.

job_report_id.description: Unique ID for this report instance (e.g. rpt_a1b2c3d4).

job_id.description: Foreign key to the Job Record in the job database.

jd_hash.description: MD5 or SHA-256 hash of the raw JD text used to generate this report. Used for cache invalidation — if the JD changes, a new report must be generated.

prompt_version.description: Version identifier for the analysis prompt used. Cached reports are only reused when both jd_hash and prompt_version match.

analysis_version.description: Version of the role_analyzer module that produced this report.

analyzed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this report was generated.

status.description: active = current report for this job/jd_hash/prompt_version. superseded = a newer report exists (JD changed or prompt updated).

superseded_by.description: job_report_id of the report that supersedes this one, if status=superseded.

run_id.description: Run ID during which this report was generated.

summary.description: One to three sentence summary of the role's organizational purpose.

problem_solved.description: The specific business, operational, or technical problem this role helps solve.

evidence.description: Exact phrases or sentences from the JD or research supporting this context.

primary_function.description: Primary function label (e.g. Analytics, Risk / Compliance, Engineering, Mixed / Hybrid).

function_mix_description.description: Brief description of function breakdown for hybrid roles.

likely_inputs.description: Data, documents, systems, or processes the role works with.

likely_analyses.description: Analysis, execution, coordination, or decisions the role performs.

likely_outputs.description: Reports, decisions, code, models, or recommendations the role produces.

likely_stakeholders.description: Who the role communicates with or works alongside.

jd_phrase.description: Exact or closely summarized phrase from the JD.

underlying_capability.description: What this JD phrase actually requires the person to do or understand in practice.

research_contribution.description: What web research clarified or changed about this demand. Empty string if research adds nothing.

underlying_skill_demands.description: Translation of JD phrases into actual demand stack. Up to 8 most important demands.

primary_workstream.description: Internal key for role category; product label: role category. Exact label from configs/workstream_taxonomy.yaml, or 'unknown'.

secondary_workstreams.description: Secondary role category labels (internal workstream keys).

workstream_evidence.description: Evidence supporting role category classification (internal workstream keys).

workstream_confidence.description: Confidence in role category classification (internal workstream key).

analyst_notes.description: Concise analyst summary: what the role is really about, who would succeed, what makes it distinct.

used_research.description: Whether a validated web-research bundle was fed into Layer 1 ([RESEARCH] context). False = JD-only report.

research_bundle_hash.description: Content hash of the research bundle used, or 'none'. Folded into the report cache key.

research_validation_status.description: Anti-fabrication gate result for the research bundle, when research was attempted.

research_source_count.description: Number of research sources verified against real web_fetch calls.
